response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified performer as Hoshimachi Suisei. 2. Identified two songs from on-screen text: '夜を待つよ' (00:00-02:26) and 'Stellar Stellar' (02:26-end). 3. Searched for lyrics for both. 'Stellar Stellar' lyrics successfully retrieved. 'Yoru wo Matsu yo' lyrics transcribed from on-screen display.
response.global_summary: A live performance video featuring VTuber Hoshimachi Suisei singing her original songs 'Yoru wo Matsu yo' (Midnight Grand Orchestra) and 'Stellar Stellar', accompanied by a live band.

scenes.description: Hoshimachi Suisei performs 'Yoru wo Matsu yo', an original song by the project Midnight Grand Orchestra, of which she is a member. The song is accompanied by a live band. Japanese lyrics appear on the screen in a karaoke style.
